ChapterSteps.mainString:
You are a young adventurer, who just arrived in the city of Areth build around a giant petrified tree.
Your current goal is to register at the local guild in order to gain access to the dungeons inside the tree.

You follow the signs mounted on large poles to the guild.
Numerous people greeted you along the way, which was quite the change of pace from the dull and uninteresting encounters you had along the way to the city.
Luckily the reception at the guild was quite empty, so you could easily get right up to the counter and start the registration process.
After a short conversation you where given a badge and the registration papers, even though you are just startet as the lowest rank the first floor of the dungeon is now open and you can start one of the apprentice quests.

events.eventDescription: You have successfully registered at the guild and received your badge and a health potion. What is your name?

ChapterSteps.mainString:
Before you decide to go to the guild you walke a bit furher down the main road filled with diffrent shops and merchants who sell all kind of goods on the sidewalks.
After a while you find a shop that looks more affordable compared to the gold in your pokets and decide to enter it.
Inside a grumpy looking old man looks at you and just mumbles 'What do you want ?'

You stand in front of a large bulletin board with numerous quests posted on it, each with a brief description, rank and reward.
The bronze badge you received will allow you to take one of the apprentice quests, most of them are about killing various monsters in the starting areas of the dungeon.
You step out of the guild now you can head to the dungeon to start your first quest or explore the city a bit more.

events.eventDescription: You are now outside the guild and can explore the city or head to the dungeon to start your first quest.
